transcription.text: Well, your man's big day is almost here. How about it? Have you got that graduation gift all picked out for him? Well, there's one special gift he'll really appreciate. A handsome new Bulova to get him off to a good start. Now, for example, here's the famed Bulova Senator. This is the watch only Bulova could create. A masterpiece of precision and styling, shock-resistant, with a lifetime unbreakable mainspring. And handsome matching expansion band. And the price? An unbelievable $35.75. Only Bulova could bring you such style, such distinction, such fine precision accuracy for so little. So hurry to your Bulova jewelers. Give your young man the graduation gift he'll wear with pride and pleasure. The gift of a lifetime. The handsome Bulova Senator. Remember, there's a world of difference in watches. Insist on the best. Bulova.
